ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "analyzer_path" TEXT /* Path to the Zend Code Analyzer binary */,
  "default" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration setting */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration setting is required or not */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's source code repository */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Current build status of the project */,
  "last_build_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last build */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "project_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file analyzed */,
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis type */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type_id") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user left the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_warnings" (
  "project_warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project warning */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warning */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the warning is enabled for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project warning was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project warning was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_warnings_warning_id FOREIGN KEY ("warning_id") REFERENCES warnings ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_warnings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
